title: vnd.proton.expire (ProtonMail)
description: Implement ProtonMail expire extension. Actions: expire "unit" "value" (units: day/minute/second, max 730 days) and unexpire (remove expiration). Tests: hasexpiration (boolean), expiration :comparator "i;ascii-numeric" :value "le" "day" "N" (compare expiration time). Documented at proton.me/support/sieve-advanced-custom-filters and in docs/vendor/protonmail/sieve-extensions.md. No RFC; proprietary.
